text: this is gold, merged into the checklist. this is exactly what the buddy system is for
PSA the security training link expires after 7 days — new hires do it in week 1 or IT has to reissue it
sales/CS onboarding now includes a support-ticket shadowing day too — knowing the product's rough edges helps everyone
q2 onboarding retro: avg time-to-first-PR is 6 days, down from 11 last year. buddy system + devcontainer get the credit
